description: Deception, identity theft, influence, and manipulation of others.
traits: Voice Mimic Master
It replicates any voice perfectly, even sacred incantations and whispered prayers. Allies turn on each other, unable to tell friend from imitation.
Magnetic Personality
Literally magnetic. Metal weapons fly toward it or wrench away from their wielders. Its lair hangs with suspended swords and stolen armor.
Puppeteer Strings
Invisible threads extend from its body, controlling people and objects like marionettes. It treats every encounter as a puppet show and keeps its favorites.
Mirror Twin
It exists with its opposite, born from every reflection. The two despise each other but share a life force, and killing one only empowers the survivor.
Name Devourer
It eats true names, and the named are forgotten. No one remembers its victims, not friends, not family, not even written records. It collects names like jewels.
Betrayal Incarnate
It grows stronger wherever trust breaks. It whispers doubts about loyalty, and every act of treachery in its presence feeds it further.
Glory Thief
It steals heroic deeds from history, claiming them as its own. Heroes wake to find their greatest achievements forgotten, woven into a false legend.
Identity Merchant
It trades in selves. Personalities, memories, even souls can be swapped between bodies for a price. It runs a black market in fresh starts.
Reflection Stealer
It takes your reflection from every mirror and puddle. Victims cast no image, and the stolen reflections serve as spies and weapons in its collection.
Living Riddle
It cannot be harmed until its riddle is solved. When one answer is found, it simply poses another. It exists only to be understood.
Perfection Poisoner
It ruins flawless things. Masterworks crack, pure substances spoil, brilliant plans collapse. Artists hide their best work when it draws near.
